steps.title: Respect the audience
steps.content: The audience already knows what leporellos are, so the sentence should not define the form. It should describe the specific work December from My Window.

steps.title: Focus on the work itself
steps.content: A, C, and D spend time explaining leporellos or Haddad's general practice. The effective sentence describes the expanded work's panoramic landscape and its ink-and-watercolor medium. The answer is B.
